questionHtml: Describe, using another method, how a mixture of four amino acids, alanine, arginine, glutamic acid and glycine, could be separated when placed in a buffer solution of pH 6.0.
markschemeHtml:
Any three of:
«gel» electrophoresis «technique»
OR
mixture «in buffer solution» placed on gel/paper ✔

voltage/potential «difference» applied ✔

amino acids move differently «depending on pH/isoelectric point» ✔

compare/measure distances travelled/Rf values ✔

NOTE: Accept “mixture placed on plate covered with polyacrylamide «gel» OR “mixture put in a gel «medium»”.

meta.title: Describe, using another method, how a mixture of four amino acids, alanine, arginine, glutamic acid and glycine, could be separated when placed in a buffer solution of pH 6.0.
